title: The Sacristy Dead-Drop
description: Behind the loose stone in the sacristy's north wall — third course from the floor, second from the left — is a small oilskin packet. Inside: a folded copy of the falsified fire tables with German margin annotations in red pencil, and a handwritten note in French reading 'Confirmed. Eastern corridor clear 0700–0900. Proceed as planned. — R.' The oilskin is dry; it was placed here recently, before the morning rain reached the interior.
